modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion about how transfer credits are applied to my degree.

full_description_text: I'm trying to figure out how my transfer credits were applied to my degree program. I submitted a request but haven't received any clear info yet. It's important for me to understand this to plan my courses effectively.

description: I'm trying to figure out how my transfer credits were applied to my degree program. I submitted a request but haven't received any clear info yet. It's important for me to understand this to plan my courses effectively.
